name: todos
description: Per-WD TODO persistence + HTTP routes (/v1/todos, /v1/todos/cwds, /v1/todos/:cwd). Storage is one JSON file per working directory under /tmp/yha-todos-<sanitized-cwd>.json. Library half (readTodos/writeTodos/rememberLabel/listAllCwds) is consumed by bridge/tools/exec.ts for the TodoWrite/TodoRead tool calls and by the MCP-Tools aggregator for cwd-scoped task lists. Disabling the module 404s the routes and surfaces an error in the bridge tool path; the frontend half (todos store + modal) keeps its slot but stays empty.
